description_long: This is a freestanding, double-sided chalkboard sign commonly seen on urban sidewalks or outside cafes and shops. The frame appears to be made of dark wood, supporting two chalkboard panels that form an A-frame structure. One side features a large blue and white circular logo with red text reading 'Slice is not using sketchfab Foreeva!!', while the other side displays handwritten red chalk text and a simple drawing. The chalkboard surfaces are matte and slightly worn, showing smudges and chalk residue typical of repeated use. The legs are straight and sturdy, providing stability for outdoor placement. The overall appearance is utilitarian, with a focus on visibility and easy updating of messages.
description: A freestanding, double-sided wooden chalkboard sign with handwritten red chalk messages and a blue logo, designed for sidewalk or storefront use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the narrow profile of the A-frame structure and the meeting point of the two chalkboard panels.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the chalkboard with a blue and white logo and red handwritten message, framed by dark wood.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, highlighting the slim edge and the A-frame's support structure.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the second chalkboard panel with red handwritten text and a simple drawing, framed by the same dark wood.
